tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def incidents (pagerduty_incidents {:status "triggered", :urgency "high"}))
(def ids (map :id incidents))
(def body (clojure.string/join "\n" ids))
(insert! :emails {:to_addr "oncall@acme.io", :subject "Triage", :body body})"}
